zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Ferrers於大約1336年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，她的父親Henry de Ferrers II34歲，母親Isabel de Verdun22歲。她於1356年7月18日之前與David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年10月22日在英國肯特阿福德享年40歲，埋葬在英國肯特阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Ferrers于大约1336年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，她的父亲Henry de Ferrers II34岁，母亲Isabel de Verdun22岁。她于1356年7月18日之前与David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年10月22日在英国肯特阿福德享年40岁，埋葬在英国肯特阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Ferrers was born about 1336, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, her father, Henry de Ferrers II, was 34 and her mother, Isabel de Verdun, was 22. She married David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl before 18 July 1356, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 22 October 1375, in Ashford, Kent, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Ashford, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Ferrers est née environ 1336, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Ferrers II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Verdun, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl avant 18 juillet 1356, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1375, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Ferrers um 1336 in Groby, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Ferrers II 34 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Verdun 22. Sie hat vor 18. Juli 1356 in Groby, Leicestershire, England David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Oktober 1375 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Ashford, Kent, England und wurde in Ashford, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Ferrers è nata il circa 1336 nel Groby, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Henry de Ferrers II, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Verdun, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl prima del 18 luglio 1356, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 22 ottobre 1375, nel Ashford, Kent, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Ashford, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Ferrersが約1336年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父Henry de Ferrers IIは34歳，母Isabel de Verdunは22歳であった。1356年7月18日以前にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでDavid IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Athollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年10月22日にイギリスケントアシュフォードで40歳で死去し，イギリスケントアシュフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.New Castle-On-Tyne, Northumberland, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Ferrers(이)가 대략 1336년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Ferrers II(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Verdun(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1356년 7월 18일 이전 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 10월 22일 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Ferrers nasceu aproximadamente 1336, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Ferrers II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Verdun, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl antes 18 de julho de 1356, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1375, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.New Castle-On-Tyne, Northumberland, Engl: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Ferrers родилась около 1336 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Ferrers II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Verdun, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl перед 18 июля 1356 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 октября 1375 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Ferrers nació aproximadamente 1336, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Ferrers II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Isabel de Verdun, tenía 22 años. Se casó con David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl antes de 18 de julio de 1356, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1375, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.
